pr.title: Link and ninja apply HSD Bytecode
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: PR 2590 marked sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c as Matching in configure.py and adjusted GALE01 symbol metadata for HSD ByteCode-adjacent data from global address-style names to local compiler-style labels. The automated report records linked-code progress and one new .sdata2 match for main/sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.

key_files.role: Build/configuration change: sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c moved from NonMatching to Matching.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:configure.py hunk at MatchingFor, Object(NonMatching, "sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c") -> Object(Matching, "sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c")

key_files.role: Symbol metadata update for data, sdata, and sdata2 entries around HSD ByteCode.

what_changed.text: Changed configure.py so sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c is built as Matching instead of NonMatching.

Renamed several .data string symbols at 0x804074F0 through 0x80407574 from global lbl_8040xxxx names to local @393, @394, @395, @398, @399, @404, and @407 entries, adding a local ...data.0 label at 0x804074F0.
Changed HSD_ByteCode_804D5F98 and HSD_ByteCode_804D5F9C in .sdata from global symbols to local @396 and @397 symbols, including a size change for 0x804D5F98 from 0x4 to 0x1.
Changed HSD_ByteCode_804DE7A0 through HSD_ByteCode_804DE7D0 in .sdata2 from global HSD_ByteCode_* symbols to local @392, @400, @401, @402, @403, @405, @406, and @409 float/double symbols.
Automated report recorded linked code +5640 bytes, matched data +56 bytes, linked data +232 bytes, and one new match for main/sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode .sdata2 from 87.50% to 100.00%.

smart_moves.text: The PR pairs enabling bytecode.c as Matching with symbol metadata updates for nearby ByteCode data, suggesting the config flip depended on correcting section/scope metadata rather than only changing source code.
The updated symbols prefer local compiler-style @ labels for anonymous constants and strings where the previous global HSD_ByteCode_* or lbl_* names were not retained.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For a baselib matching flip, symbol metadata may be part of the match: section, scope, size, alignment, and local-label ownership changes can accompany the configure.py NonMatching-to-Matching transition.
evidence_refs: text_corpus:automated report showing one new bytecode .sdata2 match

decomp_lessons.lesson: Do not assume address-style global data names are canonical when matching HSD ByteCode data; this PR replaced multiple global names with local @ labels and local labels.
evidence_refs: raw_diff:config/GALE01/symbols.txt lbl_804074F0 series replaced with @393 etc.
raw_diff:config/GALE01/symbols.txt HSD_ByteCode_804DE7A0 series replaced with @392 etc.

naming_conventions.convention: Anonymous local data constants/strings in symbols.txt may use compiler-style @NNN names with scope:local instead of global address-derived labels when metadata supports local ownership.

The PR removed HSD_ByteCode_804D*/HSD_ByteCode_804DE* global names for several local .sdata and .sdata2 entries, so those names should not be treated as established semantic names based on this PR alone.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Promote an object to Matching only after the config and symbol metadata agree; here bytecode.c was flipped to Matching while adjacent data symbols were localized and resized where needed.
For .sdata2 completion, check whether float/double constants should be local @ labels with correct alignment and size rather than global address-style HSD_* names.

review_feedback.text: decomp-dev[bot] reported linked code 42.55% (+0.15%, +5640 bytes), matched data 41.43% (+0.00%, +56 bytes), linked data 35.03% (+0.02%, +232 bytes), and one new match for main/sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode .sdata2 from 87.50% to 100.00%.
No human review comments were present in the loaded PR slice.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Matching flips can require symbol metadata cleanup
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2590 moved sysdolphin/baselib/bytecode.c from NonMatching to Matching and concurrently localized ByteCode-related .data/.sdata/.sdata2 symbols, including local @ labels, scope changes, and a size adjustment.
